'''Gar''' was a muscular [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorrean]] who worked for the [[Squib/Legends|Squib]] crime lord [[Slythor]] on [[Korad]]. He wore armor made from a reptilian creature and typically carried a large [[Vibro-glaive/Legends|vibroglaive]].

==Appearances==
*[[Operation: Elrood (book)|''Operation: Elrood'']] {{1st}}
